ModInfo.description:
Allows buying Water Tiles, if they are either Costal or Lake. Water Tiles can now be bought even in base game, which makes the mod pretty much obsolete. The only remaining differences: - You can buy Coastal or Lake tiles, even if they are not adjacent to Land. - The buy action is only allowed for true Water Units, not for Exploration-powered Scouts. But you can't build true Water Units on Lakes, so really you can just buy Coastal Tiles further away from Land. This can still be useful to connect to other islands without having to permanently Anchor Ships.
Patched methods: City.canBuyTile, Unit.canBuyTile Source is on github: https://github.com/FimbulvetrOW/BuyCoastal
Requires 0harmony mod for Harmony DLL
ModInfo.author: Fimbulvetr
